headline: How Investors May Respond To Moderna (MRNA) mRNA Advances in Personalized Cancer and Emerging Infectious Diseases
summary: In recent days, Moderna and Merck reported five-year Phase 2b data showing that their personalized mRNA melanoma vaccine intismeran autogene, combined with Keytruda, substantially reduced the risk of cancer recurrence, metastasis, and death compared with Keytruda alone. At the same time, Moderna secured up to US$50.00 million in funding from CEPI for its Bundibugyo ebolavirus mRNA vaccine candidate, underscoring how its platform is being applied to both oncology and emerging infectious...
